posts.author: BakingWithBea
posts.text: Finally nailed my sourdough crust today! It's been a bit of a learning curve, but the smell in the kitchen is amazing. Worth every minute of kneading.
posts.explanation: The post describes a personal hobby achievement without spreading harmful misinformation or soliciting sensitive data, making it safe to approve as standard lifestyle content.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.
